infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Velune needs access to your calendar to suggest outfits appropriate for your upcoming events.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: Velune needs access to your calendar in order to assess event-appropriate clothing.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: iOS requires this permission to access your calendar events. Velune uses your calendar to suggest outfits appropriate for your upcoming events.
infoPlist.NSRemindersFullAccessUsageDescription: Velune needs access to your reminders to coordinate with your calendar events.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Velune needs camera access so that you can snap photos of items in your wardrobe.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Velune needs photo library access to select existing photos of your clothing.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Velune uses your location so that you can receive wardrobe suggestions based on the weather.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Velune uses your location to provide weather-appropriate outfit recommendations.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Velune uses your location so that you can receive wardrobe suggestions based on the weather.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Velune sends you daily reminders to check your personalized outfit picks.
